title: LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS - 211info
text: NEW ROADS LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people to housing programs, including shelter information, other housing resources, tenant support, and non-housing resources. Does not provide emergency housing or rental assistance, and there may be a waitlist. 941 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Ages 16-24 who are homeless or at risk of becoming homeless Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday 8:30am-4:45pm, Wednesday 8:30am-2pm and 3:30pm-4:45pm Email (541) 686-4310 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 686-4310 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call to make an appoitment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On LTD bus lines 51 and 53 Services: Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - NEW ROADS SCHOOL HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - NEW ROADS DROP-IN CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEW ROADS
